Who I Am
About Me

Hi! I'm Rajasree — a 3rd year B.Tech student specialising in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science at Erode Sengunthar Engineering College, Tamil Nadu.

I'm driven by curiosity and a passion for technology. From presenting papers on Voter Management Systems to participating in national-level hackathons, I love taking on challenges that push me to think differently.

Beyond academics, I actively pursue certifications in Data Analytics, Algorithms, Networking, and Operating Systems — because great engineers never stop learning.
